CVE-2020-25614.title: xmlquery before 1.3.1 lacks a check for whether a LoadURL respons ...
CVE-2020-25614.summary: xmlquery before 1.3.1 lacks a check for whether a LoadURL response is in the XML format, which allows attackers to cause a denial of service (SIGSEGV) at xmlquery.(*Node).InnerText or possibly have unspecified other impact.
